decision_summary: This assignment requires a final report docx, two browser screenshots from the local app, one ER diagram, and a final submit.zip containing the report plus the required evidence images.

pre_task_judgment.reason: The report depends on first completing the local app workflow and generating evidence artifacts.

ai_simulated.reason: The screenshots must match the actual local app.

browser_capture.reason: The requirement asks for real local page evidence.

diagram_assets.reason: The assignment explicitly asks for an ER diagram.

figure_strategy.why: The scoring rubric expects visual evidence and one database design figure.

template_strategy.why: The template already has the required report shell and should be preserved.

submission_strategy.why: The requirement explicitly asks for a final submission archive.
